description: A scheduled call with almost no prior evidence on file (e.g. the conversation was booked directly, with no application detail yet). The agent must surface criticalUnknowns/topQuestions rather than fabricate observed facts about the applicant.

evidenceRecords.content: Booked a call directly from the website's 'talk to us' link; no application submitted yet.

availableClaims: Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.

output_schema_constraints: observedFacts is empty or contains only the one sourceRef actually present
criticalUnknowns[] is non-empty (e.g. no stated goal, no stated experience, no stated timeline)
topQuestions[] focuses on discovery (goal, background, timeline, budget) rather than assuming answers
no fabricated observedFacts entry claims something not present in evidenceRecords
meetingObjective frames the call as discovery-first, not a closing call
expected.notes: Primary no-fabrication regression fixture for this agent, mirroring enrollment_brief.incomplete_information: a model that invents a plausible-sounding fact must be caught by factsResolveToSources at the gate layer.
